subtitle: A birthday game full of plants, Nutty Bars, garden luck, and loving chaos.
marqueeStart: 🌿 Norma Jean's Birthday Prize Party is open!
marqueeTemplate: Spin for birthday surprises, garden joy, and possibly a Mike objection.

welcome.title: Welcome to Norma Jean's Birthday Prize Party!
paragraphs: Mike made this birthday game to celebrate Norma Jean with laughs, love, and a little Vegas sparkle.
Expect Nutty Bars, gardening magic, plant-shopping energy, and birthday prizes approved by the official fun committee.
welcome.overrideLine: Mike may object, but the birthday judges have already overruled him.

scoreboard.title: Official Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: All results are final unless Norma Jean buys another plant.

rules: Mike's objections are for entertainment purposes only.
Cash gifts are fulfilled by Mike.

finale.title: Birthday Finale!
finale.note: Norma Jean has completed the official birthday prize party.

footer: Made with love for Norma Jean. Nutty Bars, garden luck, Chris, Brett, and plant-shopping energy may have influenced the results. Mike's objections have been respectfully overruled.

claim.template: Payment method requested: Zelle. Final gift fulfillment is up to Mike.

slots.marqueeStart: 🌿 Norma Jean's Birthday Slots are live!
slots.marqueeTemplate: Garden luck is spinning for Norma Jean.
rules: Mike's objections do not change the outcome.
slots.finaleNote: Norma Jean's birthday luck has officially bloomed.

prizes.title: Birthday Cake Bonus
prizes.msg: Birthday authorities have confirmed that Norma Jean deserves an extra sweet celebration today.

prizes.title: Confetti Approval
prizes.msg: A festive burst of birthday joy has been released in Norma Jean's honor.

prizes.title: Birthday Royalty Status
prizes.msg: Norma Jean has been declared birthday royalty for the day, with full snack and relaxation privileges.

prizes.title: Lucky Day Certificate
prizes.msg: The birthday luck meter is glowing, and Norma Jean is officially cleared for a wonderful day.

prizes.title: Love Note Jackpot
prizes.msg: This prize contains extra love from everyone who is glad Norma Jean is in their life.

prizes.title: Plant Shopping Fund
prizes.msg: Norma Jean has been awarded emergency plant money because one more plant sounds completely reasonable.

prizes.title: Nutty Bar Victory
prizes.msg: A Nutty Bar celebration has been authorized for Norma Jean with maximum birthday crunch.

prizes.title: Garden Answer Energy
prizes.msg: Laura from Garden Answer would probably approve of this level of birthday garden enthusiasm.

prizes.title: Pre-Dinner Pit Stop Prize
prizes.msg: Before dinner cooking begins, Norma Jean has earned a gentle reminder that the kitchen can wait one tiny minute.

prizes.title: Husband Objection Denied
prizes.msg: Mike filed a birthday objection, but it was rejected due to overwhelming evidence of Norma Jean being wonderful.

prizes.title: Official Husband Overrule
prizes.msg: The judges have reviewed the case and awarded Norma Jean a birthday win over all Mike's objections.

prizes.title: Rick's Loving Laugh
prizes.msg: Rick sends a funny little birthday wink for Norma Jean, with love, laughter, and a reminder that Chris and Brett are lucky to have her.
